diagrams.title: Cache Memory Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between CPU, cache levels (L1, L2, L3), and main memory
diagrams.purpose: Understand the memory hierarchy and how cache bridges the CPU-memory speed gap

diagrams.title: Cache Miss Flowchart
diagrams.description: Visual representation of what happens during a cache miss
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete sequence of events during a cache miss and associated penalties

diagrams.title: Address Decomposition in Cache
diagrams.description: Shows how a memory address is divided into tag, index, and offset fields
diagrams.purpose: Understand how cache uses address bits to locate data and perform tag comparison
